Usage: sandbox-cli manager [OPTIONS] [OPERATION] [OPERATION_ARGV]...

Arguments:
  [OPERATION]          
  [OPERATION_ARGV]...  

Options:
      --gateway-socket <HOST:PORT>       
      --gateway-auth-token <TOKEN>       
      --default-sandbox-id <SANDBOX_ID>  
      --progress                         
  -h, --help                             Print help
